scripts.build: bun run --filter @tavern/agent-runtime-protocol build && bun run --filter @tavern/memory build && bun run --filter @zknicker/tavern-openclaw-messenger build && bun run --filter @tavern/openclaw-gateway-adapter build && bun run --filter @tavern/claude-usage build && bun run --filter @tavern/codex-usage build && bun run --filter @tavern/server build && bun run --filter @tavern/runtime build && bun run --filter @tavern/website build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @tavern/agent-runtime-protocol typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/memory typecheck && bun run --filter @zknicker/tavern-openclaw-messenger typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/openclaw-gateway-adapter typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/claude-usage typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/codex-usage typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/server typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/runtime typecheck && bun run --filter @tavern/website typecheck
